title: Garlic Shrimp Stir Fry
description: Quick and flavorful gluten-free shrimp stir fry, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This dish is cooked to perfection with garlic and a hint of Mediterranean spices.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the shrimp and cook for 2-3 minutes per side until pink and cooked through.
Stir in the rich stir fry sauce and Mediterranean seasoning blend.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes until the sauce has thickened.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
